creator: fluffy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 229471
Update Boost to 1.77.0

Office@ asks to execute exp-run for Boost update from 1.72.0 to 1.77.0

Patch is also available from https://people.freebsd.org/~fluffy/-patches/boost-1_72-1_77.diff


Most of failed consumers are already fixed in WIP area https://github.com/fluffykhv/freebsd-ports-boost
